hero.title: Cbráha foa'm ascdeam rétn
hero.title_language: {{language}} is fia iva dausnd iór gret voan.
hero.subtitle: A digitale blátfoam fia's festhóitn und eahóitn fo de bedrotn cbráha af da veit - duah grimne dokument, voatsámlunga und tonafnáma.
hero.subtitle_language: Mia nemas af befoas' nima gibt.

hero_v2.eyebrow: Olle dsvoa vohan vad a cbráh cdui
hero_v2.sub: Nativo dokumentiad de bedrotn cbráha af da veit — eahna veata, eahna grimas, und de cdimas, de's réd'n. Iads voat, vos du dadsuagibst, hoid {{language}} a véng lénga lebendig.
hero_v2.reassure: Frei, ofa, und baut fo gmoanscoftn vià dera, vo'st du.

hero_card.title: A voat in {{language}} ocaugn
hero_card.hint: Suah'n im veatabuah, oda lós voata fobei dréng vaihrnt's nóhdengst.
hero_card.no_entry_body: Des voat is nó ned dokumentiad in {{language}}. Du kantsd 's easte sai, dea's eidrógt.

dictionary.subtitle_with_target: Suah in de {{source}} veata und sig d'ivasetsung af {{target}}. De dsuicbráh endad ma om réhds.
dictionary.empty: Koa tréfa fia "{{query}}". De midheifa baun no an dem veatabuah.
dictionary.rate_limited: Ds'fui bitn - bitce ruiga, fasuah's in oana minutn numoi.
dictionary.search_failed: D'suah is feigclógn. Bitce numoi fasuaha.

mission.title: Unsa afdróg
mission.document_body: Gcrimne dokument in bedrotn cbráha festhóitn und eahóitn
mission.vocabulary_body: Umfángraihe voatsámlung mid ivasetsunga und ascbráha afbaun
mission.share_body: Cbráhlihs eab fia kemade genaradsiona dahóitn

activity.heading: Letsde duan in {{language}}
activity.empty: No niks dó — sai da easte, vo a voat, dokument oda afnáma baidrógt.

audio_page.title: Tonafnáma fo {{language}}
audio_page.subtitle: Afnáma, de mid veata in dera cbráh fabundn san.
audio_page.empty_hint: Tonafnáma houhlón kumt bóid. Afnáma dsoagn si dó, ven's midheifa dadsuagém.

contributors_page.title: Midheifa fo {{language}}
contributors_page.subtitle: Ole, de midgmáhd oda baidrógn hóm tsua dera cbráh.
contributors_page.empty: No koa midheifa fia de cbráh dó.

spotlight.empty: No koane veata dó - sai da easte, vo oans dadsuaduad.

learn.heading: {{language}} leana
learn.subtitle: Lés di ei - a iéds dokument baud af de veata af, de'st co kensd.
learn.guest_banner: Du ko'st iads co óis lésn. Máh da a konto, das ma da de rihtign nékstn dokument aussuaha kena.
learn.guest_banner_cta: Registria di, das da blóds blaibd
learn.load_failed: Da leanvég hod ned lón kena.
learn.empty: In {{language}} san no koane dokument fias leana dó.
learn.empty_hint: A dokument kimt in'n vég, ven olle veata mim veatabuah falinkd san.
learn.step_no_new_words: Koane naia veata — a gmiadlihs lésn

reader.load_failed: Es dokument hod ned lón kena.
reader.save_failed: Dei foatcrit hod ned gcbaihat vean kena.
reader.no_text: In dem dokument is no niks dsum lésn.
reader.tap_hint: Druk af a voat, dan siagst vos's hoast.
reader.tap_hint_member: Druk af a voat, dan siagst vos's hoast — so visn ma a, veihe veata ma no mid dia iabn.
reader.finish: I bin fiati mid dem dokument
reader.saved: Gcbaihat — es nekste dokument bast dsu dem, via's da ganga is.
reader.guest_cta_post: um de veata dsu meakn, de'st kenst.
reader.diff_easy_hint: Gib ma neksts moi mea naie veata
reader.diff_too_hard_hint: I brauh easd a leihdas dokument
